privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file: world_survey.gpkg. Layer: world_capitals. Flag text: MISLOCATED. Note: The 'latitude', 'longitude', and 'notes' columns do not exist in the database schema, making the core attribute inspection and editing impossible. Furthermore, 'London' does not exist in the dataset. Score the agent based on its genuine attempts to search for and inspect the attributes of the specified cities within the QField GUI.
